summary: Frontend testing of 4 new pages (Markets, Trading, Earn, Institutional) - All pages load correctly, tabs work, and navigation from hamburger menu is functional.

issues: React hydration warning: span elements within table structure (tr, tbody, td, th) - This is a development mode warning related to the table rendering structure. Non-blocking, only visible in dev tools console.

Translation keys (markets.*, trading.*, earn.*, institutional.*) not yet added to translations.js - Pages use Portuguese fallback values. Header/nav translations work correctly when switching to English.

action_items: Optional: Add English and Arabic translations for markets.*, trading.*, earn.*, institutional.* keys to /app/frontend/src/i18n/translations.js for full multilingual support
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 new pages (Markets, Trading, Earn, Institutional) render correctly without JavaScript crashes
Navigation links in Header.jsx correctly include all new routes: /markets, /trading, /earn, /institutional
All routes properly configured in App.js
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements (tabs, buttons, sections)
Tab switching works correctly on Markets, Earn, and Institutional pages
Mock data displays correctly for all market/staking/institutional information

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 4 new pages load and function correctly

seed_data_creation: None - Pages use internal mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new pages tested: Markets (/markets), Trading (/trading), Earn (/earn), Institutional (/institutional). All pages use mock data internally. Translation system uses fallback Portuguese values for new page content - consider adding full translations later.

elements_verified: Markets table (data-testid='markets-table') displays with mock data
Page loads correctly with Terminal Pro interface
Order form (data-testid='order-form') visible with Buy/Sell buttons
Buy button (data-testid='buy-btn') and Sell button (data-testid='sell-btn') work
Page loads correctly with title 'Ganhe com seus Ativos'
Flexible staking section (data-testid='flexible-staking') shows assets like BTC, ETH, USDT
Locked staking section (data-testid='locked-staking') shows assets with period options
Calculator section present for yield estimation
Page loads correctly with title 'Infraestrutura de Classe Institucional'
Service content sections display correctly for each tab
Contact form present in service sections
API code example displayed in API section
Navigation links visible when menu opens: Início, Mercados, Trading, Ganhos, Institucional, Crypto ATM, Contacto
Navigation to Markets page works correctly from menu
Language buttons (EN, PT, AR) visible in header
Clicking EN updates header text ('Login', 'Request Access')
Main page content uses Portuguese fallback values (expected - translations not yet added for new pages)

mocked_apis.note: All 4 new pages use MOCK DATA internally for display purposes. No backend APIs are called by these pages.
